pageDescription: This guide will show you how to add media to your website.
content: [{"id":"29064257-8914-41b5-bc1d-9b5d222526cc","component":"Alert","data":{"variant":"tip","title":"Known bugs","message":"The area that this documentation is talking about has a few known bugs and will be ironed out in future releases.","showIcon":"true","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"106f8b58-7e41-4776-b1fd-7543ed7f6c06","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"87333c1f-1b53-4203-826e-10c131ae068e","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Adding media to your website is a fairly straightforward process, in your admin panel, in the header, look for \"Media\"","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"07aaf721-1768-48f0-821a-abf2e787f1b6","component":"Image","data":{"src":"/media/images/documentation/adding-media/1772889289373-pasted-image-1772889288588.png","alt":"Placeholder Image","fit":"cover","lazy":true,"aspectRatio":"auto","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"19b66514-1335-409f-9f06-bb8d895df026","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"5ba349ac-f130-4b8b-a247-7646b99a17af","component":"Text","data":{"content":"You'll then be greeted by this UI, the left hand side of this page is the hierarchical view, this shows the directory structure of your \"media\" directory in the repository, You can click on directories to go into them, or click on an image etc... for a preview, you can also right click to get a menu as seen below, this allows you to perform certain tasks on your uploaded files. ","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, allows you to use your recently uploaded media straight onto a page as expected in any other editor. You can also preview images in the media manager, simply double click on an image, and a preview modal will pop up, giving you a preview of whatever file you've selected.
